title: Tatra T6A5 Szeged livery
description: Contains Szeged's Tatra tram in the blue livery! Only compatible with the MTR mod!
body:
This resource pack currently contains 1 tram, the Tatra T6A5 in Szeged's blue livery. The model is not entirely accurate but I think it looks pretty nice!
The model was NOT created by me fully, I did change very few things on the model and gave it a competely new repaint! In the future, there will be coming new repaints for this tram which I will include in a further release of this exact pack. This is currently version 2! 

This is the first public release of this pack; please report any issues or bugs to me in DMs.
Szeged's original tram is the T6A2 but there was no good quality model for me to use, this one is basically the same.
Pack contains readme file.

### Includes:
- T6A5 in blue livery
- Actually working/spinning wheels when in movement.
- Working doors
- realistic sounds
- Custom working display
